name: Scallop Pie (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the scallops and cut them in half.
2. Simmer the scallops in milk for 15 minutes.
3. Strain the mixture, reserving the liquid.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a saucepan.
5. Stir in the flour and cook for about a minute.
6. Gradually add the reserved milk, stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Add the sliced mushrooms and simmer for about 10 minutes longer.
9. Add the white wine or sherry.
10. Return the scallops to the saucepan.
11. Transfer the mixture to an ovenproof dish.
12. Cover with mashed potatoes, ensuring they cover the fish to the edges.
13. Dot the remaining butter over the top.
14. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for 20-30 minutes, or until the top is turning brown.
